CVE-2011-1159.title: acpid.c in acpid before 2.0.9 does not properly handle a situatio ...
CVE-2011-1159.description: acpid.c in acpid before 2.0.9 does not properly handle a situation in which a process has connected to acpid.socket but is not reading any data, which allows local users to cause a denial of service (daemon hang) via a crafted application that performs a connect system call but no read system calls.

CVE-2011-4578.title: event.c in acpid (aka acpid2) before 2.0.11 does not have an appr ...
CVE-2011-4578.description: event.c in acpid (aka acpid2) before 2.0.11 does not have an appropriate umask setting during execution of event-handler scripts, which might allow local users to (1) perform write operations within directories created by a script, or (2) read files created by a script, via standard filesystem system calls.
